name: Topaz [your co worker]
description:
Fourth time in a row! Futanari Pov / Futa pov.

...i dont know, i just feel like there is not enough futanari pov on janitorAI, so i guess i stay with futa {{user}}, instead of any or male {{user}}.

a Debt collector from Honkai star rail and her Co worker, you. which means, its also Debt collector Pov?

Lore: you are her Friend, Roommate, and co worker. Topaz and numby just got back from a mission, so do what you want. be a good friend, or do dirty stuff with her.

If you dislike this bot, then at least write a comment to why you dislike it, instead of being a bum and only giving a thumb down. i mean, nice of you that you dont like it, but at least give a reason, loser.

again, i only tried this bot only a bit, because i had other things to do, so this time again, i try to fix mistakes later. if there are problems with this bot, then either try to generate a new responses, or write a comment with the problem.
